title: Silent's Delight
description: Silent's Delight is an addon mod for Farmer's Delight based around adding culinary content to the Deep Dark!
body:
📖 About:
Silent's Delight is an addon mod for Farmer's Delight based around adding culinary content to the Deep Dark!  

 

Ever wanted to try out sculk based foods? Now you can. From warden ears up to shrieker souls everything is possible!

Perhaps even you will become sensitive to stuff.

 

🔨 Required Dependencies:
Farmer's Delight
